---
id: get-playlist-sync-progress
title: "Get playlist sync progress"
description: "Returns the current sync progress percentage for a playlist. Used for progress bar updates."
sidebar_label: "Get playlist sync progress"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get playlist sync progress"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/playlists/{id}/sync-progress"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the current sync progress percentage for a playlist. Used for progress bar updates.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
